# AK Silage (এ কে সাইলেজ)

> AK Silage is a premium corn (maize) silage brand for cattle farmers in Bangladesh, produced by A.K. Heritage & Corporation in Palashbari, Rangpur. Tagline: "একমাত্র গুণগত মানসম্পন্ন পিট সাইলেজ" (The only quality-assured pit silage).

## Product
- Corn silage made from whole maize plants including the grain, properly ground and fermented, packed airtight in 50 kg food-grade bags.
- Nutrition (% dry matter basis): dry matter 30–35%, crude protein 8–12%, crude fibre 35–50%, moisture 65–70%, crude fat 2–3%, TDN 65–75%, ash 3–5%.
- For use as animal feed only. Available all year round — flood, drought or any season.

## Benefits for farmers
- Thicker milk with higher fat content; improved appetite (sweet-sour aroma cattle love); easy digestion; no daily grass-cutting hassle; reliable feed supply in every season; healthier, more profitable farms.

## Ordering & contact
- Hotline: +880 1901-244248 (call to order; orders processed same day)
- Delivery: courier nationwide across Bangladesh; wholesale pricing available
- Manufacturer: A.K. Heritage & Corporation, Palashbari, Rangpur, Bangladesh
- Website: https://www.aksilage.com (Bangla primary, English toggle available)

## Related
- Sister brand: Prantor Silage — https://www.prantorsilage.com
